---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new SDK helper, hook, or extension.
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What gap or pain point are you solving? If a helper is being duplicated across two or more existing mods, name them — promotion follows the "duplicated twice, then promote" rule.

## Proposed solution

Sketch the API. A short code example with how a mod would call it is much more useful than prose.

## Alternatives considered

What did you think about and reject? Why?

## Compatibility

Does the proposal break any existing public API? If yes, suggest a migration path.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior-art frameworks, or relevant decompiled game types.
